narrative_beat: Wide epico de quatro luas cheias em tons de sangue carmesim alinhadas sobre horizonte de cidade em ruinas P&B, estrelas caindo

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: four enormous blood-red full moons aligned in a horizontal row across the sky, each moon a slightly different shade of deep crimson and burgundy, their surfaces textured with craters and veins of molten gold, casting a collective crimson glow downward
subject.focal_point: the four blood moons dominating the upper half of the frame
subject.secondary: falling stars trailing golden fire streaking diagonally across the sky between the moons

environment.location: above a destroyed modern city skyline in ruins
environment.time_of_day: apocalyptic night, sky lit only by the four moons
environment.atmosphere: cosmic judgment, the tetrad is complete

composition.foreground: four blood moons in vivid crimson and gold dominating upper 60%
composition.midground: falling stars with golden fire trails
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white ruined city skyline along the bottom edge

lighting.key_light: crimson moonlight from four sources casting overlapping red shadows
lighting.rim_light: gold and crimson edge light on ruined buildings below
lighting.shadow_quality: deep multiple shadows from four light sources

style.post_processing: halation around each moon, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, moon surface craters visible, floating orange embers in the sky

mood.emotion: apocalyptic lyric beauty, cosmic terror rendered sublime

symbolism.primary: the four blood moons — Joel 2:31, Acts 2:20 — signs before the great and terrible day
symbolism.secondary: falling stars as the heavens declaring judgment

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
desaturated monochrome cityscape below, vivid crimson and gold sky above
tack-sharp focus on moon surfaces and star trails

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
